events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes EMT bending & installation at rough-complete stage. The measurement record shows the as-left reading inside the posted limit, gauge is readable, setup is stable, same value entered on inspection form. No defects or hazards flagged. This is a pass condition.
